project.name: Cat / @sylphx/cat
project.summary: TypeScript logging package ecosystem for lightweight structured logging, transports, formatting, tracing, redaction, OTLP export, and tail sampling.

surfaces.name: @sylphx/cat
surfaces.description: Primary public logger package and core API contract.

surfaces.name: @sylphx/cat-* extension packages
surfaces.description: Optional public transports, formatters, redaction, tracing, OTLP, and tail-sampling packages.

surfaces.name: Repository README
surfaces.description: Public package positioning, install guidance, examples, and benchmark claims.

surfaces.name: Documentation site source
surfaces.description: Guide, API, examples, and troubleshooting documentation for package consumers.

surfaces.name: CI
surfaces.description: Runtime checks plus project-control boundary test and GroundAtlas package/action dogfood.

surfaces.name: Release
surfaces.description: Main-branch package release workflow delegating to the shared Sylphx release workflow.

surfaces.name: Doctrine adapter manifest
surfaces.description: Sylphx Doctrine adapter and org-local governance catalog; not the vendor-neutral GroundAtlas default.

commands.name: check
commands.purpose: Run Biome checks for formatting and linting.

commands.name: test
commands.purpose: Run workspace package tests through Turbo.

commands.name: validate
commands.command: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build
commands.purpose: Run the practical runtime validation set used before package changes.

commands.name: test:project-control
commands.purpose: Verify neutral manifest, Doctrine adapter, CI dogfood, and release boundary.

commands.name: groundatlas:fleet
commands.command: npm exec --yes --package groundatlas@0.1.3 -- ga update --out .groundatlas-pilot && npm exec --yes --package groundatlas@0.1.3 -- ga manifest --out .groundatlas-pilot --json && npm exec --yes --package groundatlas@0.1.3 -- ga audit --out .groundatlas-pilot && npm exec --yes --package groundatlas@0.1.3 -- ga fleet . --out .groundatlas-pilot --require-atlas --strict --json && npm exec --yes --package groundatlas@0.1.3 -- ga fleet . --out .groundatlas-pilot --require-atlas --strict
commands.purpose: Prove the vendor-neutral manifest is selected, .doctrine/project.json remains an adapter, and generated JSON plus Markdown GroundAtlas reports are navigation-only evidence.

adoption.notes: Vendor-neutral GroundAtlas manifest for project-control dogfooding. .doctrine/project.json remains the Sylphx Doctrine adapter and local governance catalog. Generated .groundatlas*, fleet JSON, and fleet Markdown reports are evidence/navigation only, not source of truth. Package publication still requires the shared release workflow plus npm registry readback for affected packages.
